Quick Start¶

  1. Create a virtual environment.

  2. Install docs dependencies.

  3. Build HTML docs.

python3 -m venv .venv
source .venv/bin/activate
pip install -r docs/requirements.txt
sphinx-build -b html docs docs/_build/html

Learn Embedded RTOS in 20 Days
